scenarios.description: parse(): scanner yields no tokens, endDocument only (hasNext false)
scenarios.precondition: Use stubbed CssParser.scan(...) that returns an iterator with hasNext(FILTER_S_CMNT_CDO_CDC)==false
scenarios.expectedResult: CssContentHandler.startDocument() then CssContentHandler.endDocument() is called; no other calls
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(reader,systemID,err) returns iterator with no elements

scenarios.description: parse(): one token ATKEYWORD, handleAtRule invoked once then endDocument
scenarios.precondition: Stub scan to return one CssToken with type ATKEYWORD, CssTokenIterator.hasNext then next yields that token then hasNext(FILTER_S_CMNT_CDO_CDC)==false
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) to return iterator yielding one ATKEYWORD token
assert handleAtRule was invoked for that token and docHandler.endDocument()

scenarios.description: parse(): one token non-ATKEYWORD, handleRuleSet invoked once then endDocument
scenarios.precondition: Stub scan to return one CssToken with type IDENT, iterator ends after one element
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) to return iterator yielding one IDENT token
assert handleRuleSet was invoked for that token and docHandler.endDocument()

scenarios.description: parse(): two iterations, first ATKEYWORD then IDENT, both handlers invoked
scenarios.precondition: Stub scan to return two tokens: first ATKEYWORD, then IDENT, then no more
scenarios.expectedResult: docHandler.startDocument(), handleAtRule then handleRuleSet, then docHandler.endDocument()
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) to return iterator yielding ATKEYWORD then IDENT
assert handleAtRule called then handleRuleSet called then endDocument

scenarios.description: parse(): scan throws IOException, exception propagated
scenarios.precondition: Stub CssParser.scan(...) to throw IOException("io error")
scenarios.expectedResult: throws IOException with message "io error"; docHandler.startDocument() not called
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) to throw new IOException("io error");

scenarios.description: parse(): scan throws CssException, exception propagated
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) to throw new CssException(...);

scenarios.description: parse(): three iterations non-ATKEYWORD tokens, 3 handleRuleSet calls
scenarios.precondition: Stub scan to return three IDENT tokens then end
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) to return iterator yielding three IDENT tokens
verify three invocations of handleRuleSet and endDocument

scenarios.description: parse(): two ATKEYWORD tokens, 2 handleAtRule calls
scenarios.precondition: Stub scan to return two ATKEYWORD tokens then end
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) to return iterator yielding two ATKEYWORD tokens
verify two invocations of handleAtRule and endDocument

scenarios.description: parse(): first call hasNext true then immediate NoSuchElementException breaks loop
scenarios.precondition: Stub scan to return iterator where next(FILTER_S_CMNT_CDO_CDC) throws NoSuchElementException on first call
scenarios.expectedResult: startDocument then on NoSuchElementException break to endDocument; endDocument called
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) returns iterator where next(...) throws NoSuchElementException;

scenarios.description: parse(): mixed loop of 1 IDENT then next throws NoSuchElementException
scenarios.precondition: Stub scan to return one IDENT then next(FILTER_S_CMNT_CDO_CDC) throws NoSuchElementException
scenarios.expectedResult: startDocument, one handleRuleSet, then on NSE break to endDocument; endDocument called
pseudocode: stub CssParser.scan(...) yields IDENT then throws NoSuchElementException on second next();
verify handleRuleSet called once and docHandler.endDocument()
